rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass, improving concision and tightening claims while maintaining consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged two factual issues but did not comprehensively mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres exactly to the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability and lacks annotations for non-cosmetic changes.
